name: Asian Healthcare Specialists Limited
summary: Asian Healthcare Specialists Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides medical consultancy and services in the field of orthopedic medicine in Singapore. It operates through Ortho, Anaesthesia, ENT, and Other Medical Services segments. The company offers a range of general and specialized healthcare services comprising anesthesia, dermatology, family medicine, gastroenterology, orthopedics, ophthalmology, otorhinolaryngology, urology, and rehabilitative services. It has 16 medical specialists and doctors operating at 14 clinics. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Singapore. Asian Healthcare Specialists Limited is a subsidiary of AHS Investments Holdings Pte. Ltd.
